raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has a dire shortage of affordable housing.",
    "AB 2006 aims to streamline the state's affordable housing compliance process.",
    "AB 2063 seeks to strengthen the state's density bonus law.",
    "AB 2063 prohibits cities from imposing affordable housing fees on density bonus units.",
    "Imposing additional fees on density bonus units undermines the intent of the California State Density Bonus.",
    "The current oversight of affordable housing is handled by multiple state housing agencies.",
    "Streamlining oversight will make it less expensive and time-consuming for the state’s private sector partners to provide affordable homes.",
    "The state’s affordable housing providers are burdened by submitting reports to up to three different state agencies in various formats."
  ]
}
```
